title: Fresh Crumbly Vietnamese Pork Crumble
description: This energizing dish features tender pork shoulder steaks in a fresh and crumbly texture ideal for breakfast.

ingredients.name: pork shoulder
ingredients.notes: boneless and sliced crosswise into thin pieces

instructions: Season pork with salt and pepper. In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add garlic, ginger, and fish sauce to the skillet; sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Fold in pork shoulder pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides (about 5-7 minutes).
Drizzle with lemon juice and lime juice. Reduce heat to low-medium and simmer gently for approximately 20-30 minutes or until tender, adding more fish sauce as needed.
Transfer pork to a serving dish and sprinkle sesame seeds over top before serving.
